description_long: This is a simple, rectangular bed with a pixelated design, featuring a red blanket covering the majority of the top surface and a white pillow at one end. The bed sits on four short, blocky wooden legs, giving it a low profile. The frame appears to be constructed from wood, with the bedding and pillow rendered in solid, vibrant colors. The red blanket is neatly tucked, and the white pillow is positioned at the head of the bed, contrasting sharply with the blanket. The bed lacks any visible headboard or footboard, emphasizing its minimalist, utilitarian style. The overall appearance is reminiscent of the iconic bed design from the game Minecraft, making it instantly recognizable in digital or stylized urban environments.
description: A low, rectangular bed with a red blanket, white pillow, and wooden legs, styled in a pixelated, minimalist fashion. The design is simple and lacks a headboard or footboard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white pillow and the red blanket, with two wooden legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bed, with the red blanket and white pillow clearly separated and all four legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the red blanket at the forefront and the white pillow at the far end, with two legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1 but from the other side, with the red blanket and white pillow reversed in position.
